arts.ttl: “Far from the level of Glenn Murray” – Brighton old-boy speaks about shock over Viktor Gyökeres success
arts.sum: Viktor Gyökeres’ development at Sporting Club de Portugal has certainly been impressive, particularly for those who played alongside him at Brighton and Hove Albion. arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Harvey Elliott game time 'alerts' Premier League, Bundesliga clubs
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Harvey Elliott reportedly emerges as a potential transfer target for clubs in the Premier League and Bundesliga.
